query:
back to col-031.  from the new scope, here are the updates from architect and their identified risks: | Simplification | AC-16 scope (extract.rs vs. replay.rs) | SCOPE.md states "modify `extract.rs` to select `query_log.phase` and populate `current_phase`." ARCHITECTURE.md and SPECIFICATION.md both clarify that `extract.rs` and `output.rs` already select and propagate `phase` — the actual fix is a one-line change in `replay.rs` only. The scope description is technically incorrect; the source docs correct it with evidence. The fix is narrower than scoped. See VARIANCE-1 below. |
| Simplification | `validate()` range check for `query_log_lookback_days` | SCOPE.md is silent on `validate()` changes. ARCHITECTURE.md adds `[1, 3650]` range check to `validate()`. RISK-TEST-STRATEGY R-08 identifies absence of this validation as a Medium risk. This is a small positive addition over SCOPE.md scope that closes a named risk. Acceptable and beneficial. |\
  Critical risks for delivery:
  1. R-01 — 7 SearchService construction sites must all receive
  PhaseFreqTableHandle as a required non-optional parameter (lesson #3216)
  2. R-02 — AC-16 (replay.rs fix) is a hard gate prerequisite for AC-12 —
  gate 3b must reject AC-12 PASS without evidence of non-null
  current_phase in scenario output
  3. R-05 — CAST(json_each.value AS INTEGER) omission returns zero rows
  silently — AC-08 TestDb integration test is the gate

entries.title: ADR-004 col-031: Activate w_phase_explicit at 0.05; AC-16 Non-Separable from AC-12 (superseded by #3688)
ADR-007 col-028: query_log.phase Column Appended as Last Positional Parameter; Atomic Change Unit
ADR-005 col-020b: Time-Boxed #193 Investigation with Store-Layer Scope Boundary
ADR-002 col-026: cycle_ts_to_obs_millis Is Mandatory for PhaseStats Timestamp Conversion
Deferred scope resolution leaves AC references live — spec ambiguity risk pattern
